name: Earthquake Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 13x9 inch pan.
3. Spread the coconut and pecans evenly over the bottom of the pan.
4. Prepare the cake mix according to package directions.
5. Pour the cake batter over the coconut and nuts, spreading it evenly.
6. Mix together the butter, cream cheese, and powdered sugar until well combined.
7. Drop teaspoons of the butter, cream cheese, and sugar mixture over the cake.
8. Bake for 45 minutes. The cake will set up when cooled.
